query:
SELECT m.id, m.role, SUBSTRING(m.content, 1, 200) as content, m.createdAt, c.id as conv_id
FROM messages m 
JOIN conversations c ON m.conversationId = c.id
WHERE m.role = 'user'
ORDER BY m.createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 15
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2DPRZMbFg2pLCxP.d66dc093df58 --database hEsNGYEonud5ngJEe9CdHq --execute SELECT m.id, m.role, SUBSTRING(m.content, 1, 200) as content, m.createdAt, c.id as conv_id
FROM messages m 
JOIN conversations c ON m.conversationId = c.id
WHERE m.role = 'user'
ORDER BY m.createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 15
